metadata.title: Multi-Column Markdown
metadata.description: This plugin adds functionality to create markdown documents with multiple columns of content viewable within Obsidian's preview mode

regex.source: .setDesc("The maximum number of times auto-layout will try to balance elements between all of the columns. Setting this too high may cause Obsidian to slow down during loading and refreshing of Auto-Layout columns.")

.innerText = `${pre}${post}`

regex.source: .innerText = "The Tasks plugin is not supported in Live Preview.\nPlease use reading mode."
regex.target: .innerText = "Tasks 插件不支持实时预览。\n请使用阅读模式。"

regex.source: .innerText = "Caches rendered content in Live Preview to reduce render cycles and element flashing on note interaction."
regex.target: .innerText = "在实时预览中缓存渲染内容，以减少笔记交互时的渲染循环和元素闪烁。"

regex.source: .innerText = "Only uses cache when a file Live Preview tab is open. If both reading view and Live Preview are opened this feature is disabled."
regex.target: .innerText = "仅在文件实时预览标签页打开时使用缓存。如果同时打开阅读视图和实时预览，此功能将被禁用。"
.innerText = "实验性功能："

regex.source: .innerText = "Sets the defalut behavior when determining whether to align table to text alignment."
regex.target: .innerText = "设置确定是否将表格对齐到文本对齐时的默认行为。"

regex.source: .innerText = "This may take a while for large vaults, you can continue to use Obsidian but application may slow down during process."
regex.target: .innerText = "对于大型仓库，这可能需要一段时间，您可以继续使用 Obsidian，但应用程序在处理过程中可能会变慢。"
.innerText = "警告："

regex.source: .innerText = "This action modifies any note file with depricated syntax and could lead to corrupted file text."
regex.target: .innerText = "此操作会修改任何使用弃用语法的笔记文件，可能导致文件文本损坏。"

regex.source: .innerText = "No guarentee is given. Please make sure to back your vault up first."
regex.target: .innerText = "不提供任何保证。请确保先备份您的仓库。"

regex.source: .innerText = "This will only modify column regions without a pre-defined ID, and which use the up to date core syntax. Will not modify depricated syntax or fenced-divs."
regex.target: .innerText = "这只会修改没有预定义 ID 且使用最新核心语法的列区域。不会修改弃用语法或围栏分隔符。"

regex.source: .innerText = "This action modifies any note file missing column IDs and could lead to corrupted file text."
regex.target: .innerText = "此操作会修改任何缺少列 ID 的笔记文件，可能导致文件文本损坏。"
.innerText = ""
